queries.name: Console Statement
queries.message: {{METHOD}} — remove debug statements before committing
queries.post_filter: not_in_test_block  # skip test blocks — no-console-in-tests handles that case

queries.name: Debugger Statement
queries.message: Debugger statement — remove before committing

queries.name: Deep Nesting
queries.message: Deep nesting (3+ levels) — consider early returns or extract functions
queries.query:
[
    ;; Pattern 1: if inside if inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (if_statement
            consequence: (statement_block
              (if_statement) @IF_NESTED)))))

    ;; Pattern 2: for inside if inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (if_statement
            consequence: (statement_block
              (for_statement) @FOR_NESTED)))))

    ;; Pattern 3: while inside if inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (if_statement
            consequence: (statement_block
              (while_statement) @WHILE_NESTED)))))

    ;; Pattern 4: try inside if inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (if_statement
            consequence: (statement_block
              (try_statement) @TRY_NESTED)))))

    ;; Pattern 5: if inside for inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (for_statement
            body: (statement_block
              (if_statement) @IF_IN_FOR)))))

    ;; Pattern 6: if inside while inside if
    (statement_block
      (if_statement
        consequence: (statement_block
          (while_statement
            body: (statement_block
              (if_statement) @IF_IN_WHILE)))))

    ;; Pattern 7: for inside for inside for
    (statement_block
      (for_statement
        body: (statement_block
          (for_statement
            body: (statement_block
              (for_statement) @FOR_NESTED)))))
  ]

queries.name: Deep Promise Chain (4+ levels)
queries.message: Promise chain {{M1}} → {{M2}} → {{M3}} → {{M4}} — consider async/await
queries.query:
(call_expression
    function: (member_expression
      object: (call_expression
        function: (member_expression
          object: (call_expression
            function: (member_expression
              object: (call_expression
                function: (member_expression
                  property: (property_identifier) @M1)
                arguments: (arguments))
              property: (property_identifier) @M2)
            arguments: (arguments))
          property: (property_identifier) @M3)
        arguments: (arguments))
      property: (property_identifier) @M4)
    arguments: (arguments)
    (#match? @M1 "^(then|catch|finally)$")
    (#match? @M2 "^(then|catch|finally)$")
    (#match? @M3 "^(then|catch|finally)$")
    (#match? @M4 "^(then|catch|finally)$"))

queries.name: Eval Usage
queries.message: eval() detected — security risk, never use eval

queries.name: Mixed Async/Await and Promise Chains
queries.message: Mixed async/await + promise chains — use consistent async style
queries.query:
(function_declaration
    (async_modifier)
    body: (statement_block) @BODY)

# Post-filter: Check if body contains both await and .then()

queries.name: Console Statement in Test
queries.message: console.{{METHOD}} in test block — use proper assertions or logging

queries.name: SQL Injection Risk
queries.message: SQL injection risk — use parameterized queries, never interpolate into SQL

queries.name: Command Injection Sink
queries.message: Potential command injection sink — avoid child_process command execution with untrusted input
queries.query:
[
    (call_expression
      function: (member_expression
        object: (identifier) @MOD
        property: (property_identifier) @FN)
      arguments: (arguments) @ARGS
      (#eq? @MOD "child_process")
      (#match? @FN "^(exec|execSync)$"))
    (call_expression
      function: (member_expression
        object: (member_expression
          object: (identifier) @MOD
          property: (property_identifier) @NS)
        property: (property_identifier) @FN)
      arguments: (arguments) @ARGS
      (#eq? @MOD "child_process")
      (#match? @FN "^(exec|execSync)$"))
  ]

queries.name: Detached Async Call
queries.message: Detached async call — ensure this Promise is awaited or explicitly handled

queries.name: Hallucinated React Import
queries.message: '{NAME}' is a Next.js API, not from 'react' — import from 'next/{CORRECT}' instead

queries.name: Insecure Randomness
queries.message: Insecure randomness source detected — use crypto.getRandomValues or secure RNG APIs
queries.query:
(variable_declarator
    name: (identifier) @VAR
    value: (call_expression
      function: (member_expression
        object: (identifier) @OBJ
        property: (property_identifier) @FN)
      arguments: (arguments) @ARGS)
    (#eq? @OBJ "Math")
    (#eq? @FN "random")
    (#match? @VAR "(?i)(token|secret|password|key|nonce|salt|csrf|auth|session|credential|hash|otp|pin)"))

queries.name: React Anti-Pattern
queries.message: React anti-pattern: setState inside a loop causes multiple re-renders — batch with a single state update

queries.name: SSRF Risk
queries.message: Potential SSRF sink — validate and allowlist outbound URLs
queries.query:
[
    (call_expression
      function: (identifier) @FN
      arguments: (arguments [(identifier) (member_expression) (call_expression) (await_expression)] @URL)
      (#match? @FN "^(fetch|get|post|put|patch|delete|request)$"))
    (call_expression
      function: (member_expression
        object: (identifier) @OBJ
        property: (property_identifier) @FN)
      arguments: (arguments [(identifier) (member_expression) (call_expression) (await_expression)] @URL)
      (#match? @FN "^(fetch|get|post|put|patch|delete|request)$"))
  ]

queries.name: Weak Hash Primitive
queries.message: Weak hash primitive selected (md5/sha1) — use sha256+ for security-sensitive contexts

queries.name: Dynamic Regex Construction
queries.message: Dynamic regex from user input — can cause ReDoS (Regular Expression Denial of Service)

queries.name: Variable Shadowing
queries.message: Variable '{{NAME}}' shadows a parameter — use a distinct name

queries.name: Await in Loop
queries.message: Await in loop — sequential execution is slow, use Promise.all()

queries.name: Missing super() call in derived class constructor
queries.message: Constructor of derived class must call super() before accessing 'this'

queries.name: Empty Catch Block
queries.message: Empty catch block — properly handle or log the error
queries.query:
(catch_clause
    (identifier) @ERR
    (statement_block) @BODY)

# Post-filter: Check if body is effectively empty (ignoring comments)

queries.name: Hardcoded Secret
queries.message: Hardcoded secret in variable assignment — use environment variables

queries.name: Long Parameter List
queries.message: Function has {{PARAM_COUNT}} parameters — use object pattern

queries.name: Nested Ternary
queries.message: Nested ternary — use if/else or early returns for clarity
